# Branavan Selvasingham

> Applied AI and agentic systems leader building systems that turn frontier model capability into trusted products, workflows, and production outcomes.

## Hero

Branavan Selvasingham  
Applied AI and agentic systems leader

I build systems that turn frontier model capability into trusted products, workflows, and production outcomes.

VP, Head of AI & Product Engineering at Zafin.  
Builder across agentic systems, enterprise AI, robotics, and spatial computing.

## Intro

I work at the intersection of applied AI, product engineering, and trusted execution.

My background spans enterprise AI, startup building, robotics, and spatial computing, but the through-line is consistent: designing systems that make emerging technology useful in the real world. I'm most interested in agent-native product engineering, human+AI operating loops, and the systems required to move from demo capability to durable production value.

## Contact & Links

- Website: https://www.branavan.com/
- X: https://x.com/0_branavan_1
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/branavanselvasingham
- Medium (essays and experiments): https://medium.com/search?q=branavan+selvasingham
- GitHub: https://github.com/BranavanSelvasingham

## Selected Work

### Zafin - AI & Product Engineering Leadership
AI and product engineering leadership across large-scale banking software, focused on platform modernization, enterprise AI adoption, and agentic workflow delivery.

### Nimbus POS
A bootstrapped restaurant POS platform that reached paying customers, exceeded operating costs, and exited through client/data acquisition. Built and operated from 2015 to 2018.

### SO-101 Robot Experiments
Hands-on exploration of embodied AI, robot control loops, and tool-using systems in the physical world.

### VisionOS / Shape of mu
Spatial computing experiments and 3D graphing work using SwiftUI and RealityKit.

### IBM Achievement
Built large-scale systems used by millions and received formal technical recognition at IBM, including work recognized by the 2022 Outstanding Technical Achievement Award.

### Talks / Media / Industry Signal
Public-facing AI conversations and appearances tied to banking, AI, and product transformation, including Microsoft and Money20/20 sessions.

## Current focus

Most of my current work is concentrated in:

- Agent-native product engineering
- Reliable AI workflows with human verification and controls
- Turning frontier model capability into production systems
- Robotics and embodied interaction
- AI-native product ideas with real commercial leverage

## Current thinking

- The model is rarely the moat by itself; the operating loop around it usually matters more.
- Useful agents need structure: tools, permissions, verification, observability, and fallback.
- The hard part of applied AI is less the demo and more trust, reliability, and adoption in production.
- Frontier capability matters most when it becomes durable product leverage.

## Writing / thinking

I'm more active on X. This site is where I keep selected work and occasional writeups.

- Follow on X: https://x.com/0_branavan_1
- Essays and experiments: https://medium.com/search?q=branavan+selvasingham

## Archive / More Projects

Broader project history, embedded demos, and exploratory builds.

## Active Personal Projects (2024 +)

### SO-101 Robot (LeRobot)
Fun robotics exploration with SO-101; first hello-world movement and video.

Update (December 2025): tested direct model control of the LeRobot SO-101 using tool calls with a gripper-mounted camera and goal loop control.

Repository: https://github.com/BranavanSelvasingham/lerobot-llm-chess

### Vision OS App
Diving into spatial computing, augmented reality (AR), and AI with a first Vision OS app: a simple 3D graph visualizer called "Shape of mu".

## Currently: VP, Head of AI and Product Engineering @ Zafin

### A podcast with Microsoft's Head of Banking Strategy
Discussed the future of AI in Financial Services (and the overall Enterprise landscape) with Tyler Pichach, Head of Banking Strategy at Microsoft.
Video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jtcGHd4MaBc

### Money 20/20 Presentation (2023)
Presented at Money 20/20 at Microsoft's AI stage. Presented views and an early roadmap that has since been matured and executed.

## Accomplishments at IBM (non-client sensitive) (2018 - 2023)

### Accomplishments
- Production AI systems built and shipped for over 20 million users.
- 2022 Outstanding Technical Achievement Award for conversational AI orchestration work.

## Past Corporate Research Projects (non-client sensitive) (2018 - 2023)

#### Conversational AI Kiosk
Kiosk with animated emotive facial expressions for engaging interaction.

#### Auditable Network of Containers
Published defensible IP for transactions between non-trusting parties using auditable networks.
Publication: https://priorart.ip.com/IPCOM/000260415/

#### Boston Dynamics Spot Simulation
Created environmental simulations to improve robotics capabilities.
Article: https://medium.com/learningreinforcementlearning/choosing-the-right-platform-to-begin-your-hands-on-journey-with-rl-c4110b6cd6d9

#### Smart Locker
Designed and implemented an intelligent locker system with secure access and ownership transfer flows.

#### Psychological Health Assessment
Developed AI-driven conversational tools for psychological health assessment.

#### Vision-Based Robot Arm Motion
Engineered robot arm motion systems with computer-vision-guided control and dynamic target tracking.

## Nimbus POS: Startup Journey (2015-2018)

### What is Nimbus POS?
Nimbus POS was a SaaS platform for small cafes to manage orders, inventory, and customer interactions with predictive features.

### Key features
- Predictive inventory management
- Intuitive UI with minimal clicks per order
- Canadian tax support
- Integrated loyalty and analytics
- Wireless printing
- Cross-device support

### Achievements
- Bootstrapped to paying customers
- Monthly recurring revenue exceeded operating costs
- Exited through data and client acquisition by Nown POS

## Past Personal Projects (2015-2018)

### Home Hub (Touch, Voice, Display)
Built an integrated smart home hub combining touch, voice assistant features, custom display behavior, and gesture controls, with custom hardware and PCBs.

### Robotic Conference and Vision
Built a robotic vision and conferencing setup with head-tracking behavior.

### Dynamic Retail E-Paper Labels
Designed e-paper label systems for dynamic pricing updates, including touch capability, dual display layouts, and proximity sensor behavior.

### Smart Surface Projection
Created an adaptive projection setup combining a robot arm and laser pico projector.

### Video Transcript Analysis
Built a web application (thegreatmind.org) for transcript handling and insight extraction from video content.

## Education

### MBA - Schulich School of Business, York University
Focus: Finance and Entrepreneurship

### Mechanical Engineering - University of Waterloo
Focus: Robotics and Aerodynamics.  
Fourth-year research: ornithopter/drone flight mechanics and aerodynamics.
